summary: Aligned careerspan-decomposer output format with actual Intelligence Brief structure

changes.change: Updated to output wrapped structure with overall_score, bottom_line, category_scores, signal_strength, and skills array instead of flat skills array
Updated to handle both new wrapped structure and legacy flat array format
Updated schema to use actual field names (skill_name, required_level) and allow nullable fields for graceful handling
Updated documentation with new wrapped output format, version bumped to 2.1
Migrated existing data from flat array to wrapped structure

warnings: bottom_line is empty/missing - legacy data did not have this field

learnings: The decomposer was outputting flat array but schema expected wrapped object - code and schema must be designed together
Field naming inconsistencies (name vs skill_name, level_required vs required_level) should be caught by validation tests earlier
Making schema fields nullable allows graceful migration of legacy data
next_steps: Overview extraction prompt now includes category_scores - future extractions will populate this
Downstream Meta-Resume generator should read from scores_data['skills'] not scores_data directly
